themes.exampleQuote: The Barista featured drink (Amaretto & Brown Sugar Latte) might be thee best cup of coffee I've ever had.
Everyone is always so nice when I go here.
Wish they had the zucchini muffins year-round, but there are lots of other great baked goods.
Loved the cinnamon plum tea and was impressed by the number of tasty food options.
The interior leaves something to be desired for the price of the coffee.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about the creative specialty drinks, warm staff, and eclectic baked goods, with the only gripe being that the interior ambiance doesn't quite justify the coffee prices.
notable_quote: One of my fave coffee shops in Pittsburgh. Fabulous staff and consistent drinks.
